title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy, exploring how iterative self-improvement can be applied to software development. The video argues that while the use case is not universal, it offers a novel perspective on improving software through automation and feedback loops.
